name: a routed tool emits a valid SARIF 2.1.0 document even when the tool binary is absent (tool-independent stream)
command: printf 'resource "aws_s3_bucket" "b" {}\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool tfsec --file main.tf --json 2>/dev/null > t.sarif; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("t.sarif","utf8"));process.exit(j.version==="2.1.0"&&Array.isArray(j.runs)?0:1)' && echo absent-tool-valid-sarif 1>&2
